summary: TypeScript Phase 4 Migration Testing Complete. Verified 102 .ts/.tsx files migrated (all pages, components, hooks, contexts, lib utilities). 59 .js/.jsx files remain (all Shadcn UI vendor components - intentionally kept). All 29/29 Vitest unit tests pass. Build completes successfully with no TypeScript compilation errors. All UI pages render correctly and navigation works.

context_for_next_testing_agent: TypeScript Phase 4 complete. 102 .ts/.tsx files (all app code), 59 .js/.jsx files (Shadcn UI vendor components only). Build passes, 29/29 unit tests pass, all UI pages work. Console errors are Firebase analytics fetch errors (expected in preview environment).
